hash_54adfaf9d3d1c9e1: ^1Woods: ^7Microwaved bogies. Just how we like 'em. Impaired and sluggish.
hash_54bd6cde309476e7: ^1Woods: ^7Wait, do I speak the wrong language? Is that why you do nothing I trained you to do?
hash_54dad97d25932e2f: ^1Woods: ^7Now, upon impact, a mesh mine will stick to any surface that it hits.
hash_554f6ee2f70c439a: ^1Woods: ^7I wonder if they feel as stupid as they look. Actually I don't. Fucking shoot 'em.
hash_55badcba03616849: ^1Woods: ^7Oh hey, FYI... you're about to be blown to bits.
hash_565224d4028d9ace: ^1Woods: ^7Looks like the enemy's got a grandad too. They just dropped some wire on us.
hash_5670713355d569af: ^1Woods: ^7Okay, that's a deuce. Let's hustle over to the next marker.
hash_56ced5c6ffe47932: ^1Woods: ^7Alright, let's go booby trap Cyber Division.
hash_5732f3db7e8d6604: ^1Woods: ^7Slow and wounded on a wire. New cable show. See what I did there? Cable.. Wire... Ha... Fuck you.
hash_575b1bfd8757e096: ^1Woods: ^7Don't just stand there, man. You got an RPG... Use it!
hash_57c0c2d10ba9b63e: ^1Woods: ^7Hey, turn around. Now some genius is gonna think it's a good idea to bum rush the path. Right? So let's Razor the shit out of it.
hash_57f18573c3c3579f: ^1Woods: ^7Okay maybe you're in a tough spot, man, but it's not hopeless. You have a Barricade to cover your butt.
hash_580f8d3b6d0568c5: ^1Woods: ^7You need a Strike Team.You earn one with a scorestreak.
hash_59d67ef2c934a397: ^1Woods: ^7Takes notes as he kicks your butt... learn a thing or two!
hash_59e7e37b555de803: ^1Woods: ^7You see that? It's a bomb. It has a timer. Tick tick tick... might want to defuse that.
hash_5b1c47c0adbf0abf: ^1Woods: ^7Aww, look, Juneau wants to play. Maybe those fellas up there wanna be a chew toy.
hash_5b5a1d02f70490e4: ^1Woods: ^7I said the marker. Set it up at the marker.
hash_5c73567c5abc029b: ^1Woods: ^7Torque? Ya don't drive a train, you're a combat engineer!
hash_5cbe6541e3d46c13: ^1Woods: ^7Hey, is that you in there? Just checkin'. Plant the damn shield.
hash_5cf444b5266cc8f9: ^1Woods: ^7Good. A well a placed mesh mine will teach them the error of their existence.
hash_5d18ff6739126e87: ^1Woods: ^7Seriously, man. The only people who will appreciate your shooting are the ones you're trying to kill.
hash_5dc4f36434e2fa53: ^1Woods: ^7Well that sucks. Who we gonna kill now?
hash_5e25d5912bc8be5f: ^1Woods: ^7Aw man, just destroy the trap already. C'mon, I got shit to do.
hash_5e9edefcfef64945: ^1Woods: ^7Atta boy. Now do the server room. Tag the entrance.
hash_5eb5de9e148b4bd4: ^1Woods: ^7Mary, Mary, quiet and scary, the enemy creeping near. But a turret gun fired and spun, and  chopped em all up.
hash_5ee38a6626ded415: ^1Woods: ^7But, if you get killed, you go back to being a zero.
hash_5f15df4c85423b71: ^1Woods: ^7You're about as fast as a fart in a wind storm. Get to the marker, stink wad.
hash_5f623b58f30b928b: ^1Woods: ^7Ha, there. Charlie needs to get through that doorway. We need to fuck up his day. Break out the Razor wire, baby.
hash_5f6276e10688348e: ^1Woods: ^7Alright, now that's just absurd. People are laughing. At you, not at me. You. Once more, go again.
hash_5f6643fb682f039f: ^1Woods: ^7Private stink wad, what is your major malfunction? Move move move move move!
hash_600ebb6d0ef51f4c: ^1Woods: ^7Ha, this guy, he's my new favorite meal. Shredded dimwit.
hash_601d4e6d94e0acbc: ^1Woods: ^7You do look better dead, but go again.
hash_606116872a0f4a8e: ^1Woods: ^7I call this stuff Mason wire. And the boss, she says you kicked butt, so it's time move on.
hash_60a20668f86625d8: ^1Woods: ^7You got two corridors, incoming  enemy at both. Pick one for yourself and give the Sentry the other. Now defend!
hash_60d5e73bb1a512d5: ^1Woods: ^7Hey, is that you in there? Just checkin'. Plant the shield.
hash_6222ab0c4198cd43: ^1Woods: ^7You think he's stuck? Try the 405 at rush hour. At least no one's shooting at you. Well... Okay, it's the same.
hash_626e5eaa24422947: ^1Woods: ^7Bad position on that turret gun, pal. Needs more traffic.
hash_62ae273f21bc8767: ^1Woods: ^7Let's use their aggression against them. Rip a scorestreak on their ass.
hash_62eadb6f9bcc154a: ^1Woods: ^7Mary, Mary, quiet and scary, enemy creeping near. But a turret gun fired and spun, and fucked them all up.
hash_62efbcf66be1f2db: ^1Woods: ^7Fun, right? Now, let's move up. I'll teach how to set a more sophisticated trap.
hash_62f11a07e5868b5a: ^1Woods: ^7And, not only does it offer self preservation, but it's got a radiation field that works like a human snowplow.
hash_62f24b04dc838da8: ^1Woods: ^7Alright man, stop right here. Take notes 'cause some primordial stuff is about to happen here.
hash_631dc51ba4ea15dd: ^1Woods: ^7Upon impact, a mesh mine will stick to any fucking surface it hits.
hash_6367fa23757f0e38: ^1Woods: ^7Your girl works two jobs, man. Follow and patrol. In follow mode she's your shadow, until she's rips some guy's throat out. Good girl...
hash_6401cbd635e9bd79: ^1Woods: ^7You know what, fuck it. Put the razor wire wherever you want. I'm done for the day. Mason, let's get some sushi!
hash_656cf1b2c8a21e3f: ^1Woods: ^7Use the stuff that slices off fingers and ears. Hanzel and Gretel that thing.
hash_65febe02905db1f2: ^1Woods: ^7C'mon, Big T. Get that large ass of yours to the OM!
hash_663f385f5088f18e: ^1Woods: ^7What the hell happened? I turned around to get a coffee and you're dead.
hash_6647d1b0d4795c2a: ^1Woods: ^7Alright, mesh mines! Indicated Targets are right there. Launch one.
hash_66f532f62cd338e9: ^1Woods: ^7Hey garden boy, get that mesh mine planted.
hash_671b2b783659c9a9: ^1Woods: ^7Le'ts go red, Barricade up. Got things to do.
hash_673b9870d9cb1a25: ^1Woods: ^7And remember, always put this shit in spots they can't see or avoid.
hash_676435ad61fe8d09: ^1Woods: ^7Enemy attack on the Barricade. You know what to do.
hash_677ab4efefc04351: ^1Woods: ^7The only barriers that exist are the ones you create, snowflake. Now get to it!
hash_6800c0a9a2645371: ^1Woods: ^7Move your butt, your cover is gone.
hash_681d9101f4412951: ^1Woods: ^7Alright, let me guess. Musician? Just could not resist playing the D string... for dipshit!
hash_6932a46b1590b8c5: ^1Woods: ^7Seriously. The only people who will appreciate your shooting are the fucking enemy.
hash_697b4ee7a79d84ca: ^1Woods: ^7Hah... You're about to become Humpty Dumpty.
hash_6a2fa858408c999f: ^1Woods: ^7Le'ts go red, Barricade up. Got shit to do.
hash_6a3bed2aa8b0acde: ^1Woods: ^7When you snag a dip-wad, finish them quickly. That's just good manners.
hash_6ac2e4597673b13e: ^1Woods: ^7Basically, you make real estate easy for your boys and a nightmare for the opposition.
hash_6b22fd7cd1d08246: ^1Woods: ^7I love espresso. I can watch them kick your butt three, four times before it's even made.
hash_6c8054720cea9d38: ^1Woods: ^7Tick tock, baby. The Enemy got a bomb planted out there somewhere. Find it, defuse it... clock's ticking.
hash_6cb1f34fcf7f832c: ^1Woods: ^7Okay, point the launcher at the target and slowly squeeze the trigger.
hash_6d85089c00de0184: ^1Woods: ^7Yeah, it's a tactical disaster, no barricade. Congrats on doing shit your way.
hash_6d8821dc84182334: ^1Woods: ^7Wait, you just missed with an RPG? What the... go again.
hash_6da14a794c09d1a7: ^1Woods: ^7I wouldn't say you are useless, but when you're dead? Ya kinda are.
hash_6fb83dc144f88169: ^1Woods: ^7Today at Sarge's Bar and Grill the lunch special is  turret shredded sea fucker... with a side of gleeful whimsy.
hash_7101f3d8376daf4e: ^1Woods: ^7Aw, and after all that practice.  Go again.
hash_711c75d6e65d50d1: ^1Woods: ^7Alright jungle boy, simpel stuff. You mesh mines together to make a trap!

hash_733bffb568e2a08c: ^1Woods: ^7Oh shit, the enemy's got a grandad too. Just dropped some wire on us.
hash_739374093e16e900: ^1Woods: ^7Ok... Johnny Jackass and his merry band of idiots are pissed off! You took out their little firecracker, and now they want it back. They're coming for you in numbers.
hash_7464e35ace18e034: ^1Woods: ^7I love espresso. I can watch them kick your ass three times before it's even made.
hash_753e4c1588692d8f: ^1Woods: ^7Man, it's an RPG... How do you miss with a rocket propelled grenade?
hash_766bfce0bba466b7: ^1Woods: ^7Move your ass, your cover is gone.
hash_76ee62c1a21fd5d6: ^1Woods: ^7Alright, stop here. Take notes, man. Some primordial shit is about to happen.
hash_775a66824210a6ca: ^1Woods: ^7Two kinds of people in this world, man - the quick and the dead. You ain't quick.
hash_77c3322171900401: ^1Woods: ^7You are a natural at snagging stuff. Now get some target practice.
hash_77da606837f2e05b: ^1Woods: ^7Let me guess... Musician?  Just could not resist playing the D string for dipwad!
hash_77efa355fafd8367: ^1Woods: ^7You got fresh troops on a full bird. It's waiting on you.
hash_78a4093980489ec2: ^1Woods: ^7Damn straight, you stopped em. Both your team and your gear appreciate it. No, no, no, don't get weird with this.
hash_792df4725e29b829: ^1Woods: ^7Now that is a thing of beauty.
hash_7a0d7045b0b711d7: ^1Woods: ^7Hey, order your K9 unit to Patrol the area.
hash_7a6f567f322eb50e: ^1Woods: ^7He had the car keys, now they're all stuck. Use the Barricade for cover, man. Clean this shit up.
hash_7a9e2f2d20a70391: ^1Woods: ^7Torque? Ya don't drive a train, you're a goddamn combat engineer!
hash_7b37fe19d4f76356: ^1Woods: ^7Wire up the doorway, baby. Clog it up good.
hash_7ba185f447039b7f: ^1Woods: ^7What are you doing, man?  The O-Marker is right there.
hash_7d9288cea36ea35b: ^1Woods: ^7Aw man, you're gonna love this. Juneau - your K9 Unit.
hash_7dc090f3dc76c65d: ^1Woods: ^7Sucks, but you have options. Risk breaking the tripwire, or...
hash_7dc5dedb264dc51a: ^1Woods: ^7Barricades have been saving soldiers since the Stone Age, but even my fine alliteration can't save you.
hash_7fd871cc6a4bb9f4: ^1Woods: ^7Out gunned, out numbered. A scorestreak is all you got. Now go fucking get it! Reset to zero.
